title: Origin Fairness, Politeness, Retries, Backoff, and p-limit · Transfer Build
summary: An independent municipal service owner supplies a different origin, markup family, dynamic boundary, accessibility need, resource budget, and injected failure and transfers origin fairness, politeness, retries, backoff, and p-limit into a changed publisher-respecting origin scheduler. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of publisher-respecting origin scheduler with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case p…
objectives: Maintain per-origin concurrency, minimum spacing, next-eligible time, request and byte budgets, and owner overrides.
Retry only classified transient and idempotent cases with attempt, elapsed, and owner budgets.
Parse valid Retry-After, combine it with capped exponential backoff and bounded jitter, and record the chosen delay.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Authorized site auditing and TypeScript Commit to the mission model · Lab Origin Buckets
steps.instruction:
lab case — A lab TypeScript team handles case 6678 during a narrow-screen keyboard and screen-reader review. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to prove per-origin eligibility, retry classification, Retry-After, bounded jitter, p-limit boundaries, and clock control; every Promise, stream, listener, timer, socket, file, browser context, and report sink needs one cleanup owner; then reorder one frontier, p-limit, Promise, AbortSignal, stream, retry, checkpoint, or shutdown event and prove ownership. Browser TypeScript uses pure bounded models and original URL, robots, sitemap, HTTP, HTML, frontier, accessibility, browser, and report fixtures only. Real DNS, Fetch, streams, Cheerio, Playwright, axe-core, files, processes, packages, containers, assistive-technology review, load, legal review, restore, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Maintain per-origin concurrency, minimum spacing, next-eligible time, request and byte budgets, and owner overrides.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: Authorized site auditing and TypeScript Commit to the mission model · Lab Origin Buckets.
